root: ^Noelle: Is that a Yellow Bass? My Mom makes those for dinner all the time.
^Sam: It sure is, I catch a bunch of these every day - most of them just go to the market, though. Maybe your mother would appreciate it if you brought home a free dinner tonight?
^Noelle: hmm... It would be nice, but I don't really like eating fish all the time.
^Sam: Someday you'll learn that having food to eat all the time is already a luxury. Take this home to your mother. I'm sure she'll love it.
